size-sm.$description: Small. Button icons, navigation items, list markers.

size-base.$description: Base. Default icon size for most UI contexts.

size-lg.$description: Large. Section hero icons, empty states.

source-primary.$description: Primary icon set. MIT licensed. https://phosphoricons.com

source-custom.$description: World-specific icons: ravens, crests, twin moons, serpents. Stored in theme/assets/.

color-muted.$description: Muted icon color (Ash) for secondary icons.

color-accent.$description: Accent icon color (Guild Gold) for active and highlighted icons.
